issues.title: Coverage: Configuration: bootstrap Configuration domain class
issues.body_raw:
**Domain:** Configuration
**Priority:** High
**Effort:** M (1–3 days)
**Foundation:** YES — blocks issues 3-14

## API endpoints touched
- `(no endpoints in this issue — foundation only)`

## Methods to add
```python
class Configuration:
    def __init__(self, client: AlmaAPIClient): ...
    def get_environment(self) -> str: ...
    def test_connection(self) -> bool: ...
```

## Files to touch
- `src/almaapitk/domains/configuration.py (NEW)`
- `src/almaapitk/__init__.py (add to __all__ + lazy import map)`
- `src/almaapitk/_internal/__init__.py (re-export)`
- `tests/test_public_api_contract.py (assert new symbol exists)`
- `tests/unit/domains/test_configuration.py (NEW)`
- `CLAUDE.md (update Domain Classes table)`

## References
- Alma dev-network: https://developers.exlibrisgroup.com/alma/apis/conf/
- `CLAUDE.md` — domain-class pattern (Client-Domain pattern) — section 'Domain Classes (`src/almaapitk/domains/`)'
- `src/almaapitk/client/AlmaAPIClient.py` — HTTP verbs (`client.get/post/put/delete`)
- `src/almaapitk/alma_logging/` — `get_logger(...)` (NEVER use print)
- `src/almaapitk/__init__.py` — add to `__all__` and `_lazy_imports` if exposing new public symbols
- `tests/test_public_api_contract.py` — extend if new public symbols are added
- Mirror existing pattern from `src/almaapitk/domains/admin.py` (small, well-bounded existing domain)

<!-- prereqs:auto:begin -->
## Prerequisites

**Recommended (would simplify or improve this work, but not strictly blocking):**
- #4 — Consolidate HTTP verbs into _request() (ensures the new domain class uses the consolidated _request() once landed)
- #14 — Replace print() with logger; remove safe_request() (ensures no print() in the new domain)
- #16 — Tighten exception handling and cache AlmaResponse.data (narrow except + cached AlmaResponse for the new domain's methods)

<!-- prereqs:auto:end -->

## Acceptance criteria
- New file `src/almaapitk/domains/configuration.py` exists with `Configuration` class.
- `from almaapitk import Configuration` works (lazy import wired).
- `scripts/smoke_import.py` passes.
- `tests/test_public_api_contract.py` asserts the new `Configuration` symbol.
- `CLAUDE.md` 'Domain Classes' table updated to list the new domain.
- No actual API methods implemented in this issue — those land in sibling tickets.

## Notes for the implementing agent
- This is a foundation-only ticket. The goal is to establish the class skeleton, public-API plumbing, and tests so that the sibling coverage tickets (issues 3-14) can each ship one focused PR.
- Pattern source: `src/almaapitk/domains/admin.py` (compact, follows the project conventions).
- Do NOT implement API methods in this PR — they belong to the sibling tickets. Only `__init__`, `get_environment`, `test_connection`.
- Wire the lazy import in `src/almaapitk/__init__.py` exactly like the other domains (see `_lazy_imports` dict).

---
Filed as part of the coverage-expansion backlog. See `docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-30-coverage-expansion-design.md` for context.
